one_time_description: Prior period adjustment recorded in 2024 restating opening accumulated surplus (Note 20)
economic_notes: Consolidated entities include Fisherman's Pride Inc., Lennox Island Development Corporation, and Minigoo Fisheries Inc. (government business enterprise). Economic development expenditures of $11,345,081 in 2024. Commercial fisheries revenue of $2,839,093.
notes: Province is PEI (PE). Consolidated entities: Fisherman's Pride Inc. and Lennox Island Development Corporation (fully consolidated); Minigoo Fisheries Inc. (government business enterprise, modified equity method). A prior period adjustment of $2,579,832 was made to opening accumulated surplus per Note 20. Net debt position of $855,702. Significant capital asset acquisitions of $10,642,661 in 2024. OSR calculation includes commercial fisheries and other revenue lines net of all government transfers. Deferred revenue opening/closing included in revenue lines per income statement presentation.
